summary: Completed testing of 3 bug fixes in Villa Paris Gestionale. All 3 bugs are now FIXED: 1) PUT /api/eventi with disposizioneSala object saves correctly (no 'Unknown argument tavoli' error), 2) dateProposte JSON string parsing in modifica-evento works (dates are visible and editable), 3) POST /api/versioni snapshot serialization works (no Prisma type error).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (modifica-evento, stampa, dashboard, report, clienti all working)

test_credentials: None required - SQLite database at prisma/prisma/dev.db
seed_data_creation: Used existing data (79 events, 92 clients). Event ID 37 'C18 Lara' used for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs are fixed: 1) eventi route.ts line 210 uses toJson() for disposizioneSala serialization 2) modifica-evento page lines 49-57 parse JSON string fields correctly 3) versioni route.ts line 130 uses JSON.stringify() for snapshot. Event 37 has 2 versions now from testing.

bug_1_disposizioneSala_serialization.details: PUT /api/eventi?id=37 with disposizioneSala:{tavoli:[...],stazioni:[]} returns 200. Field saved as JSON string in SQLite.
bug_1_disposizioneSala_serialization.api_test: curl -X PUT with JSON object disposizioneSala returns serialized string

bug_2_dateProposte_parsing.details: modifica-evento/37 page shows dateProposte as clickable badges (03/01/2026). Data Confermata dropdown populated from dateProposte array.
bug_2_dateProposte_parsing.ui_test: Playwright confirmed date badge visible, 'Aggiungi Data' button works

bug_3_versioni_snapshot.details: POST /api/versioni creates version with snapshot as JSON string. No Prisma type error.
bug_3_versioni_snapshot.api_test: curl -X POST returned versione with snapshot as string, numero:2

modifica_evento_save.details: Modifying titolo/note and saving returns success (no 500 error)

stampa_modal.details: Stampa button opens modal with BOZZA/CONTRATTO/DEFINITIVO options, Pacchetto Cliente and Documenti Operativi sections visible

dashboard.details: Shows 92 clienti, 79 eventi, €15,200 ricavi this month

report_azienda.details: Shows 40 eventi totali 2026, 5,061 ospiti, €404,880 ricavi with charts

bugs_verified_fixed.root_cause: disposizioneSala was passed as object to Prisma which expected string
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: toJson() function serializes object to JSON string before saving

bugs_verified_fixed.root_cause: Frontend was resetting parsed dateProposte array to [] incorrectly
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: parseJson helper function properly handles JSON string from SQLite

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Stampa bozza crash - snapshot type error
bugs_verified_fixed.root_cause: snapshot object passed directly to Prisma create instead of string
